questionHtml: Estimate the solute concentration of the zucchini cells.
markschemeHtml:
0.36 mol dm-3/M ✔

Units required
Allow a range of 0.35–0.37 mol dm-3/M.

meta.title: Estimate the solute concentration of the zucchini cells.
